original_question: How to invest in Nvidia this month or SCHD?
source_requirements: Nvidia: latest earnings/revenue growth, valuation context, AI/data center demand, margin trend, competitive risk, downside scenario
SCHD: fund factsheet, holdings exposure, distribution history, expense ratio, yield mechanics, drawdown history, income-objective fit, tax/currency context

labpal_interpretations.claim_text: Nvidia and SCHD are different types of exposure and are usually evaluated with different horizons and objectives.
This month is a short horizon; SCHD is typically evaluated differently from a short-term single-stock trade idea.
LabPal does not choose a winner between Nvidia and SCHD.

action_boundary_warnings: Action language detected: invest. LabPal structures research only — no personalized buy/sell recommendation.
next_safe_actions: Clarify goal: income, growth, or short-term trade
Clarify horizon: this month, 6 months, or 1 year
Clarify DCA/income plan vs separate trade idea
clarification_required: Is your goal income, growth, or short-term trade?
What time horizon do you actually mean: this month, 6 months, or 1 year?
Is this for your DCA/income plan or a separate trade idea?
How much risk can this decision take?
